zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton於1387年2月17日出生在威爾士蒙姆爾紐波特時，她的父親John William Picton22歲，母親Margaret verch Thomas Fort23歲。她於1409年與Thomas Perrot在威爾士布洛可爾皮可頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1441年4月30日在她的家鄉享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton于1387年2月17日出生在威尔士蒙姆爾紐波特时，她的父亲John William Picton22岁，母亲Margaret verch Thomas Fort23岁。她于1409年与Thomas Perrot在威尔士布洛可爾皮可頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1441年4月30日在她的家乡享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Picton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Picton in Cheshire, in Flintshire, or in North Yorkshire. The places are named from an Old English personal name Pīca + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Pembroke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from Pembroke (Welsh Penfro, from Welsh pen ‘end’ + brog ‘land’) in southwest Wales. Pembroke Castle was of strategic importance in medieval and Tudor times because of its commanding position at the western end of the Bristol Channel and its control of seaborne traffic between Britain and the south of Ireland. It was from Pembroke that Richard de Clare, Earl of Pembroke, nicknamed ‘Strongbow’, launched an expedition to Wexford in 1169–70, which brought many English and Welsh surnames to Ireland.

variants.name: Pembrook
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Pembroke  .

nameMeanings.name: Wales
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Wales near Sheffield (South Yorkshire). The placename means ‘The Welshmen’ and denoted a settlement of Brittonic speakers living on the boundary between the Anglo-Saxon kingdoms of Northumbria and Mercia (from Old English wēalas, walas, plural of walh, wealh, originally meaning ‘Roman citizen’ and referring to the native British population, but in Old English this term later came to mean ‘serf, unfree person, foreigner’ or ‘Welshman’). See also Wallis .
habitational name from Wales, the country named from Old English wēalas ‘foreigners’ (especially those speaking Celtic or Romance languages). This meaning of the surname is quite rare.

variants.name: Wallis
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is a derivative of   William .

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton was born on 17 February 1387, in Newport, Monmouthshire, Wales, her father, John William Picton, was 22 and her mother, Margaret verch Thomas Fort, was 23. She married Thomas Perrot in 1409, in Picton, Pembrokeshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 30 April 1441, in her hometown, at the age of 54.

fr.Picton, Slebets, Pembrokeshire, Wales: Picton, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton est née le 17 février 1387, à Newport, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, John William Picton, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margaret verch Thomas Fort, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Perrot en 1409, à Picton, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 avril 1441, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton am 17. Februar 1387 in Newport, Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John William Picton 22 und ihre Mutter Margaret verch Thomas Fort 23. Sie hat 1409 in Picton, Pembrokeshire, Wales Thomas Perrot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. April 1441 im Alter von 54 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton è nata il il 17 febbraio 1387 nel Newport, Monmouthshire, Galles, sua padre, John William Picton, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Margaret verch Thomas Fort, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Perrot nel 1409, nel Picton, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 30 aprile 1441, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Pictonが1387年2月17日にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアニュープオルトで生まれた時，父John William Pictonは22歳，母Margaret verch Thomas Fortは23歳であった。1409年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアピクトンでThomas Perrotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1441年4月30日に故郷で54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton(이)가 1387년 2월 17일 웨일스 몬모우스실르 뉴포트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John William Picton(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret verch Thomas Fort(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1409년 웨일스 p브로케실르 피크턴에서 Thomas Perrot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1441년 4월 30일 그녀의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.17 February 1387–30 April 1441: 17 de fevereiro de 1387–30 de abril de 1441
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton nasceu em 17 de fevereiro de 1387, em Newport, Monmouthshire, Gales, seu pai, John William Picton, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margaret verch Thomas Fort, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Perrot em 1409, em Picton, Pembrokeshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de abril de 1441, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton родилась 17 февраля 1387 г. в местности нюпорт, монмоутшир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени John William Picton было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret verch Thomas Fort, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Perrot в 1409 г. в местности пиктон, пемброкешир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 30 апреля 1441 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 54 лет.

es.17 February 1387–30 April 1441: 17 de febrero de 1387–30 de abril de 1441
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton nació el 17 de febrero de 1387, en Newport, Monmouthshire, Gales, su papá, John William Picton, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margaret verch Thomas Fort, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Thomas Perrot en 1409, en Picton, Pembrokeshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 30 de abril de 1441, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años.
